[Unit]
Description='MiOS' System pod (dns, storage, admin, sec, pxe, k3s, remote-desktop)
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Pod]
PodName=mios-system
Network=host

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
